studies.title: Vorvida - web-based self-help program for reduction of alcohol consumption: a randomized controlled effectiveness trial

_verification.reason: The study title explicitly mentions 'vorvida,' which matches the name of the digital therapeutic product described. The study appears to focus on the effectiveness of this specific web-based self-help program for alcohol consumption reduction.

_classification.reason: The title explicitly mentions 'randomized controlled effectiveness trial,' indicating randomization and interventional design, which are key indicators of an RCT.
